'''wawate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wrongways|wrongways]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-w-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wrongways|wrongways]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| wawate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:wawate|wawate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wawatesher|wawatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wawatesherĂ«m|wawatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wawatero|wawatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wawateshĂ«|wawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wawateshĂ«m|wawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwawatero|gokiwawatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwawateshĂ«|gokiwawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwawateshĂ«m|gokiwawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowawankerom|gowawankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowawankeshĂ«|gowawankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowawankeshĂ«m|gowawankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowawankeya|gowawankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wawaterom|wawaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wawatemu|wawatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wawateya|wawateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwawaterom|gokiwawaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwawatemu|gokiwawatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwawateya|gokiwawateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:wawawate|wawawate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wawawatesher|wawawatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wawawatesherĂ«m|wawawatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wawawatero|wawawatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wawawateshĂ«|wawawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wawawateshĂ«m|wawawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwawawatero|gokiwawawatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwawawateshĂ«|gokiwawawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwawawateshĂ«m|gokiwawawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowawawankerom|gowawawankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowawawankeshĂ«|gowawawankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowawawankeshĂ«m|gowawawankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowawawankeya|gowawawankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wawawaterom|wawawaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wawawatemu|wawawatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wawawateya|wawawateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwawawaterom|gokiwawawaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwawawatemu|gokiwawawatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwawawateya|gokiwawawateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:wĂŠwĂŠte|wĂŠwĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wĂŠwĂŠtesher|wĂŠwĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠwĂŠtesherĂ«m|wĂŠwĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wĂŠwĂŠtero|wĂŠwĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«|wĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m|wĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠwĂŠtero|gokiwĂŠwĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«|gokiwĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m|gokiwĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowĂŠwĂŠnkerom|gowĂŠwĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«|gowĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gowĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowĂŠwĂŠnkeya|gowĂŠwĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wĂŠwĂŠterom|wĂŠwĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠwĂŠtemu|wĂŠwĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wĂŠwĂŠteya|wĂŠwĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠwĂŠterom|gokiwĂŠwĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠwĂŠtemu|gokiwĂŠwĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠwĂŠteya|gokiwĂŠwĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:wafwafte|wafwafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wafwaftesher|wafwaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafwaftesherĂ«m|wafwaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wafwaftero|wafwaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wafwafteshĂ«|wafwafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafwafteshĂ«m|wafwafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwafwaftero|gokiwafwaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwafwafteshĂ«|gokiwafwafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwafwafteshĂ«m|gokiwafwafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowafwafnkerom|gowafwafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowafwafnkeshĂ«|gowafwafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowafwafnkeshĂ«m|gowafwafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowafwafnkeya|gowafwafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wafwafterom|wafwafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafwaftemu|wafwaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wafwafteya|wafwafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwafwafterom|gokiwafwafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwafwaftemu|gokiwafwaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwafwafteya|gokiwafwafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
